sources.issuing_organisation: Centre for Perioperative Care and British Geriatrics Society
sources.exact_document_title: Guideline for Perioperative Care for People Living with Frailty Undergoing Elective and Emergency Surgery
sources.population: Adults living with or at risk of frailty who are undergoing elective or emergency surgery.
sources.clinical_setting: Referral, surgical outpatient, preoperative assessment, ward, theatre, recovery, discharge, and community transfer.
sources.applicability_note: Exact for frailty-status documentation, function, cognition, multimorbidity, medicines, nutrition, shared decisions, and review. It is partial for geriatric patients without established frailty; the scheduled review is overdue and UAE pathways remain local.

exact_sections.heading: Standards 3-5 - frailty, comprehensive geriatric assessment, and cognition
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting frailty status for older or at-risk surgical patients, comprehensive geriatric assessment when performed, and cognition assessment.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations for primary care, surgical outpatients, and preoperative assessment
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting frailty score, nutrition and BMI, comorbidities, cognition, medicines, functional status, reassessment, and individualized shared decisions.
